zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Babington於1220年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington50歲，母親Elizabeth Anne Nescio40歲。他於大約1227年與Alice De Babington在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在英國諾圖波藍德享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Babington于1220年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington50岁，母亲Elizabeth Anne Nescio40岁。他于大约1227年与Alice De Babington在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年在英国諾圖波藍德享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Babington was born in 1220, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth Anne Nescio, was 40. He married Alice De Babington about 1227, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1250, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Babington est né en 1220, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Anne Nescio, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Babington environ 1227, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Babington 1220 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Anne Nescio 40. Er hat um 1227 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Alice De Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Babington è nato il nel 1220 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Anne Nescio, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alice De Babington circa 1227, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Babingtonが1220年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Babington Lord of Babingtonは50歳，母Elizabeth Anne Nescioは40歳であった。約1227年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでAlice De Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Babington(이)가 1220년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Anne Nescio(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Alice De Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Babington nasceu em 1220, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Anne Nescio, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Babington aproximadamente 1227, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Babington родился в 1220 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Anne Nescio, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Babington около 1227 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Babington nació en 1220, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Babington Lord of Babington, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Anne Nescio, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alice De Babington aproximadamente 1227, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1250, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
